'''Cailshh''' was a sly and unpredictable [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who was hired by [[Lik Ankkit]] on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. Cailshh's sex was unknown, though [[Ghez Hokan]] believed it was a male. Cailshh was ordered by Hokan to search for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] spies. Cailshh and his or her men torched every single farm in their path, but Hokan wasn't too pleased with this. Hokan beheaded Cailshh with [[Kast Fulier]]'s [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] as punishment and a warning to the rest of his crew, then ordered [[Mukit]], a fellow Ubese, to bury him or her in the proper Ubese manner.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}
